target.task_template:
Update user memory profile from incremental session deltas only.

Session deltas (JSON):
{modified_sessions}

Each entry contains only new thread.jsonl records since the previous successful memory_cron run. Extract NEW facts/preferences from new_messages and merge into {workspace}/persona/memory/MEMORY.md.

Do not re-read whole thread.jsonl files unless the delta explicitly indicates a reset.

Aggregate incremental vocab.md and polisher.md deltas from sessions modified since last run.

Note deltas (JSON):
{modified_sessions}

Each entry contains vocab_delta and/or polisher_delta text appended since the previous successful daily_consolidator run. Process only those deltas.

Write to: {workspace}/subagent/cross_session/daily_consolidator/data/daily/daily_{date}.md

Track user expression progress.

Input: {workspace}/persona/user_responses.jsonl
Output: {workspace}/persona/progress_bank.jsonl

Fetch news articles for benative mode practice.

Articles directory: {workspace}/persona/benative/articles/
Cursor file: {workspace}/persona/benative/.cursor_benative_articles.json
Write article JSON files and update cursor.

Translate untranslated benative articles.

Articles directory: {workspace}/persona/benative/articles/
Pairs directory: {workspace}/persona/benative/pairs/
Cursor file: {workspace}/persona/benative/.cursor_benative_translator.json
